name: Baked Autumn Vegetables with Barley & Wild Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups celery root, peeled and cubed
1 lb mushrooms, optional, halved or quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse wild rice under cold running water.
2. Place rice in a saucepan; add 4 cups water, cover and bring to boil.
3. Reduce heat and gently simmer for 10 minutes. Drain and set aside.
4. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add onions and cook until softened.
5. Stir in barley and wild rice. Transfer mixture to a 16-cup baking dish or roasting pan.
6. Spread vegetables and mushrooms (if using) over grains.
7. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
8. Pour in chicken stock and cider. Cover with lid or foil.
9. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 1 to 1-1/4 hours, or until barley and rice are tender (the rice should be slightly chewy).
Makes 8 to 12 servings
Preparation time: 20 minutes
Baking time: 1 to 1-1/4 hours
Per serving (for 12): 230 calories, 4g fat, 44g carbohydrate, 7g protein; excellent source of vitamin A; good source of niacin, folate; very high source of fiber.
